column1: Hey Matthew, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
We were looking at Punta Cana, Cabo, or Cancun
Yea all 3 are fire. I'll personally be in Punta Cana myself
how many ppl in your group so far
We don't have an exact number
yea thats solid bro. you all from the same school?
So we'd probably leave from IAD
oh bet we have a couple JMU groups this year. y'all energy is 10/10 lol
Loved “oh bet we have a couple JMU groups this year. y'all energy is 10/10 lol”
I dont know the exact sorority names tbh. but we have a group doing Punta Cana and another group doing cancun. Cancun group is a frat I wanna say
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get started?

Right now we're just comparing different packages/agencies. When we decide our best option we're going to present what it includes and price to the people interested on going. After that we know how many people we'll book
got you. I'm able to match any other price you see from another agency if its better than ours. just lmk
down to work with you and craft the best package for the group
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
bet, whats the best email to send to

just sent those over lmk if it came through. I didnt add flights for right now bc its a lot cheaper to get separately. but we absolutely can do it with flights, just lmk if you want me to check it out
Can you send a quote with flights just to compare
Also Cancun has the week prior
oh word, pricing will be the same either way
Tbh bro it's gonna be a lot cheaper to get flights separately. wont be much of a comparison, you'll save $150-200
its more so if, you want the convenience of having it all together
if so, and you dont mind spending a little more, I'll put it all together!
Liked “oh word, pricing will be the same either way”
Got you we'll probably book separately then
A lot of agencies have different packages for clubs or a cruise, do yall have something similar?
Yeaaa for sure. so at the bottom of the email you'll see a little info about it
we have our off resort party pass bundle deal for $200
and I added a potential free booze cruise deal in there if you wanna take us up on that
Do you have more info about the sponsored clubs
All three if you have them
Which you want to start with? its a lot of info lol

Bet bet, my personal favorite tbr. So the party pass comes with coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar. The venues are Imagine Cave which is a nightclub in a literal cave, Coco Bongo which is like a dope show/nightclub, and Maroca which is like an outdoor tikki club type of spot. Super dope. Theres also the open bar booze cruise which comes with transportation as well
this is the Imagine Cave vibe, for example https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RXvcdVqvARU
yea its live bro. thats where I am every year
Loved “yea its live bro. thats where I am every year”
Just out of curiosity, would it be possible to purchase the party package without the hotel
yea you def can. pricing is a little different tho, that $200 bundle is an add option with the package
Booze cruise is $75, Coco Bongo $79, Imagine is $85, Maroca $69
Does that include transportation and drinks as well?
yea yup this still includes all of that
yoo Mathew whats good bro, how we feelin about the options so far?
Still comparing things. I'm meeting w someone Friday to go over everything
I think most likely we'll do our own flight and hotel but we're definitely interested in some of the excursions from the package
Which hotel you thinking about doing?
You're gonna book it on your own for all 15 ppl?
That's a lot to put down on one card lol
Our prices are also a lot cheaper than what's on their site too btw bro. Just a heads up. Make sure you're looking at the Occidental Punta Cana and not the Occidental Caribe. Two diff resorts
Occ Punta Cana is way way nicer and where the parties and college students are
My friend said he found something but I can check and get back
Can you also send the more info about the sponsored clubs in Cancun
word bro, if you dont mind sending that over, can see what i can do to match it / get a better deal

and yea fs, so in Cancun we have events at La Vaquita and Mandala which are both night clubs, very dope they have dancers, bottle service, big dance floor. And the other club is Coco Bongo, which is more of a show/club vibe, super dope they do a bunch of different performances throughout the night
yerr whats good bro, how we feelin so far about the options?
My friend and I are going over everything tomorrow together but as of rn yall look like our most likely option for hotel and a party package
I'll keep you updated after we talk
aight bet bet lmk. still thinkin around 15 ppl?
Liked “aight bet bet lmk. still thinkin around 15 ppl?”
Can you send me a quote for 4 nights in Punta Cana + party package
From what I wrote it should be $646 for hotel and $200 for the package
yerr whats good bro, did we wanna make a move on that package?
I think punta Cana is gonna be the move
Was there a minimum for the organizer to get the free trip
thats where I'll be bro. it'll be lit to have you there
I can finesse 15 for the free stay. 15 including you
Can you give me some sort of written details on everything included
its all full listed out in the email, do you still have that? all right at the top
it would just take me a min to text it all lol
Can individuals choose to get party package or is it an all or none
2-3 guys aren't sure if they have the funds for it
Yea the insurance covers up to 75% of their payments. its through our third party Travel Insured. they add it in when they go to make their payments
if theres a chance they may cancel, I say they should add it
pricing is account specific, Ive seen it range from $30 to $100
When can they decide to return
its a cancel for any reason policy
Can you send me their policy
Our final group size is gonna be in the 15-20 range
yerr Mathew whats good brotha, hows the squad lookin?
Good I think it's gonna be in the higher end that I gave you yesterday
I have a list of people but about 5 of them are unsure if they can afford to go yet
If they all can we'll have 24
Okay dope yea thats all good
theres two payment installments. $200 gets you reserved and secure, and then the remaining balance is due just before new years
Does my trip being covered include the party package?
Like the group leader perk? its valid for the average package price of all the accounts on your reservation. so if everyone gets the party pass, then yea it'll include it
if no one gets it, then it wouldn't include it
So does the group leader still pay upfront and later get reimbursed

Yup exactly. you'll still deposit with the core group. If all is going well with the rest of the group, people are looking like theyre 100% going and keeping up, we'll be able to waive your final balance payment and reimburse the deposit
there is a $75 system fee tho! just so you know
So say half the people decide to get the package
Then I'd just pay the half when the final payments are due?
Yea or we'll just apply a part of your deposit to the party pass and reimburse the remainder if theres left over
Liked “Yea or we'll just apply a part of your deposit to the party pass and reimburse the remainder if theres left over”
We've decided to go with yall
Cool bro, happy to help y'all. I'll make the reservation for the group right now
We're doing Punta Cana, March 14-18, 24 slots?
I think we want to do 15-19 so we have that Wednesday
Do you think one is better than the other
Nah that week is lit in general. coming in either day is fine
if the 15-19 works better for y'all for flights I would go with that
They're about the same if I remember correctly
Okay dope. sending this in a sec
just sent to your email. the boys were gonna decide if they individually wanted the party pass tho right
I'm giving them the option to but I think everybody would get it
Aight bet, so people are able to add the events individually on their accounts when they sign up. but they wont see the bundle deal there that I put together for y'all in the email
the events can be added to their accounts any time, like up to 2 days before break

Best thing to do, everyone can start tapping into the link, getting their accounts started, and making their deposits. afterward, we can make a tally of the guys who want the bundle party pass discount with all the events included, and I'll add it into their accounts
For ppl who arent sure yet and want to wait to add the party pass, they can wait np, they'll just have to add each event one by one on their account later on
Sounds good just sent it out
Bet, lmk if anyone needs help navigating through. I'll be active for a little longer before I knock out lol
Where do we go from the room screen after we temporarily reserved a spot
It says first payment is due tn?
At the very top of that room page there should be a button that says 'Access My Account'
That'll take you to your personal portal if youre logged in. if youre not itll make you log in first with the password you created
If you have trouble finding it lmk and we can jump on a call quick to walk through
Should be due tomorrow. if not ill check it out and adjust
Np bro, should be all set now
One of the our guys is out of the county right now and his banks frozen so he won't be able to get his deposit in tn
Is it possible to extend his deposit due date
yea I'll put the request in, which friend?
He hasn't made an account yet they're still figuring out who's bunking with who
Oh gotchu, yea I'll be on the lookout just lmk
Liked “Oh gotchu, yea I'll be on the lookout just lmk”
yoyo we got a handful of open slots on your reservation and guys that haven't deposited
A bunch of people bailed last minute for a few different reasons
There's 8 paid and the only other that's most likely going to be there is Jeremy who I believe you've been talking to
what was the reason they bailed
A lot were price, some cause deposits were too short notice, and if some people decided not to go others followed
That's pretty weak of them. But the core group gonna have a good time
Matt brotha, ops is gonna delete the ppl that havent paid, did you want to take one last shot if seeing if any of those guys want to go?
The people who haven't payed deposit or people who haven't payed full?
The only other who isn't decided is Jeremy
I think he texted you on his own
yea we'd honestly have no place to fit jeremy without moving rooms around and doing three rooms of 3
we can do it tho he just needs to decide asap. if you dont mind hitting him up
Yeah I'll reach out but he's on vacation rn like 6 hours ahead
He's gonna reach out to you
Word he just did. but you'll want to make sure everyone in the group is cool with paying the 3 person room rate now bc its more expensive
I honestly don't think they would be
yerr, when you got a sec if you could tell everyone to toss their flights in, so we can set up your airport transfers
also were y'all looking to add any party pass tickets to your packages?
Yeah can you lmk whose missing
yea you Jacob and Lucas are the only ones with their flight info in
yoo is Nate on the same flight as anyone?
He should've just added his info
safe travels today fam. gonna be a lit week
Yo we just got out of the airport
We see the go blue sign but I don't see anybody here holding a sign or with the shirt
